remarks: Experience luxury rental living in the heart of Greenwich. This exceptional tri-level townhome offers 3 bedrooms, 3.5 baths, and an ideal blend of sophistication, comfort, and convenience. Available beginning July, this residence may be offered partially furnished, unfurnished, or considered for short-term rental opportunities, Designed for today's lifestyle, the openconcept floor plan features elegant built-ins, a chef's kitchen with premium finishes and abundant workspace, and inviting dining and living areas centered around a fireplace. A private office or den with a full bath on the lower level provides exceptional flexibility for remote work, guests, or additional living space. Additional highlights include an elevator servicing all levels, a two-car garage, generous storage throughout, and seamless indoor-outdoor living with a private backyard and patio ideal for relaxing or entertaining. Located just moments from downtown Greenwich, residents will enjoy easy access to renowned restaurants, boutique shopping, cafes, parks, cultural attractions, and transportation options. Greenwich residents also have access to the town's celebrated recreational amenities, including beaches, parks, and waterfront activities. A rare opportunity to lease a luxury Greenwich townhome offering refined finishes, flexible living spaces, and an unbeatable in-town location. Available July. Short-term lease requests will be considered.
